checks: events are strictly ordered by authority_sequence with no duplicate transition idempotency digest
the declared checkpoint digest matches a valid scope-commitment signature over the export source, cutoff, and exact population commitments
every event uses the authority currency and a positive amount magnitude
reserved plus terminally consumed or outcome-unknown value never exceeds value_max_minor
settled requires a supported settlement artifact reference
reconciled transitions name the prior unknown outcome evidence they resolve
body.settlement_rule: authorization, reservation, dispatch, and provider acceptance never imply settlement

verdicts.supported: the supplied scope-faithful event population conserves authorized payment value
verdicts.disproved: ordered events overdraw authority, double-apply a transition, mismatch currency, or claim unsupported settlement
verdicts.insufficient_evidence: the authority, event population, scope commitment, or required settlement artifact is absent
verdicts.unverifiable_scope: the value-event or conservation semantics version is unsupported
